UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar Aug-15-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: 10:03 am
Appearances:
David Wasserman for the Plaintiff FO 891 Post Street Property.
Samir O Seiba Defendant in Pro Per.

Defendant appears late. The matter is sent back from Dept. 514. The Court orders parties into the hallway to resolve the matter. 10:18 am. The Judge takes the bench. The Court raises several issues. Parties report they may have a settlement. Parties are ordered back into the hallway to resolve the matter. 10:40 am. The case settles per report of both paerties. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
